message:
test(core): add comprehensive transcription analysis tests

Add 37 unit tests for the transcription analysis module covering:
- Promoter detection (σ70, σ32, σ54, RBS) on both strands
- Terminator detection (rho-independent hairpin + poly-T)
- Transcription flow simulation with flux propagation
- Regulatory constellation computation (promoter-terminator edges)
- Edge cases (empty sequences, short sequences, overlapping hits)

Also fixes lint error in hgt-tracer.test.ts (unused constants).

Coverage improved from 27.69% to 99.53% for transcription.ts.

Contributes to: phage_explorer-wzjl.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
